strengths: Nearly two decades of engineering experience (2006–present) across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and high-scale distributed systems, exceeding the 15-year requirement
Current hands-on AI fluency: builds AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and frameworks for agentic workflows at re:cinq, directly matching the AI builder/code/design preference

Proven entrepreneurial and thought-leadership track record: founded GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform used by Green Map), and regularly inspires others through conference talks, multi-day courses, and full-day workshops
concerns: No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; formal AI credentials are absent
AI-specific work is recent (2025–present), so recognized, established expertise in AI products or platforms is not yet demonstrated
Titles have been Senior/Staff-level individual contributor; direct evidence of director-level strategic scope or advising strategic customers is limited

key_factors.factor: Depth and breadth of engineering experience
Hands-on AI-agent and cloud-native tooling fluency
Entrepreneurial founding plus public teaching and speaking

response.justification: The candidate brings roughly 19 years of engineering experience spanning low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second, cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker), and product work across web, mobile, and embedded systems — comfortably clearing the 15-year bar with a Bachelor's in Computer Science. His current role building AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic-workflow frameworks demonstrates exactly the builder-level AI and cloud fluency the role prefers, while founding and sustaining GISCollective for nearly a decade evidences the entrepreneurial drive sought within larger organizations. A consistent history of workshops, conference talks, and courses shows he can share insights and inspire others through difficult technical endeavors, making him a credible fit for a strategy-oriented principal engineering role.
